QUEEN ∆LICE

Kept the bio raw. Im so thick of it....

"Forsothe, for now I dictate the laws, mine children. If any man, in allegory, doth pervert or fashion falsehoods from foul ships within thy canon, ye shall endure a mighty punishment. For to force ships is the same as negranting access to others, mine children; it is a deed most rude, selfish, and ungrateful. By mine word as mine law, whosoever transgresseth shall face reckless punishment—

And lo, thy punishment is DEATH."
creator: Гугинот
